economic_notes: First Nation holds 17.9% interest in Nlaka'pamux Resources Limited Partnership (accounted for by modified equity method), established for commercial economic development opportunities. Also holds investments in All Nation's Trust Company, BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP, and BC First Nations Gaming Sharing General Partner Ltd.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Auditor report signed November 19, 2024 — significantly delayed. Long-term debt includes both All Nations Trust mortgage ($918,286) and RBC term loans due on demand ($252,460) totalling $1,170,746. Investment in Nlaka'pamux Resources Limited Partnership ($1,338,438) accounted for by modified equity method (17.9% interest). Funds held in Ottawa Trust Fund ($838,100) reported on balance sheet. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements. Salaries per Schedule 2 expenses by object is $336,940; segmented information shows salaries of $445,747 including taxation segment — used Schedule 2 figure. OSR calculated as total revenue ($4,041,807) minus ISC ($1,534,126) minus Province of BC ($128,826) minus FNHA ($71,500) minus CMHC ($112,459) = $2,194,896 approximately. total_government_transfers = ISC + Province of BC + FNHA + CMHC = 1,847,311. Council Discretionary segment shows large surplus of $739,687 from 'economic activities and other' — may include trust fund or one-time items.
